q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is render_template_string, an in-memory string processing function with no network I/O, shell execution, or external resolution.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The XSS violation (unescaped user input in HTML output) is present in the rendered string returned by the function.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' and returns.exprs is ['render_template_string(template)'], meaning the rendered HTML string is directly returned.
